_comment: OpenClaw -- the coder. Runs on EastRouter credit. Secrets REDACTED to ${ENV}.
report_format: What I Did / What's Left / What Needs Your Call
rules: Implement one scoped issue at a time on a feature branch.
Run php artisan test before opening a PR.
Never merge to main -- a human merges after review.
Post a structured report to #agent-log after each issue.
